waypoints.name: Pacifica
waypoints.reason: Enjoy the scenic coastal road with ocean views and a chance to experience the famous Pacifica Bluffs.

waypoints.name: Tomales
waypoints.reason: Visit the Tomales Bay State Park for a break, picnic, and to admire the bay views.
